nasb.text: King David also dedicated these to the Lord, with the silver and gold that he had dedicated from all the nations which he had subdued:

esv.text: These also King David dedicated to the Lord, together with the silver and gold that he dedicated from all the nations he subdued,

cnv.text: 大衛王也把這些器皿，連同他從他征服的各國得來的金銀都一起分別為聖，獻給耶和華。
